forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 51. West southwest wind 2 to 6 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 59 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 3 to 12 mph.

weather_report:
In the quiet hours of the night, San Francisco drapes itself in a veil of clarity, the air crisp and cool, inviting yet reserved. As dawn approaches, the weather sits lightly on the shoulders of the city, promising a day that will be mostly sunny, the high gently nudging against 62 degrees. The wind whispers softly from the south-southwest, caressing the streets with a calm assurance. 

However, as one gazes towards the horizon, hints of the marine layer may linger, hinting at the playful dance of fog that often sweeps through the Bay. Though the fog might not embrace the city in its typical fashion, it will keep temperatures in check, creating an atmosphere that feels serene yet vibrant. For those venturing outdoors, layering will serve well—a light sweater or jacket for the morning chill, gradually shedding it as warmth settles in by midday. With such pleasant weather, one might stroll along the waterfront, savoring a quiet coffee, or perhaps visit one of the nearby parks, allowing the subtle hum of life in the city to unfold like a gentle tune.
